V0906_01_00_01_0.text:
Practice makes perfect!
In both Rush Duels and acting!

V0906_01_00_02_0.text: With my natural talent, defeating you shouldn't be tough.

V0906_01_00_03_0.text: Since I'm the protagonist, I'm sure to win!

V0906_01_00_04_0.text: You can act tough, but you can't outact me!

V0906_01_00_05_0.text:
If we're gonna Duel, let's Duel!
My lunch is getting cold!

V0906_01_00_06_0.text:
You want a Duel?
I thought you wanted my autograph.

V0906_01_00_07_0.text: Leaving this tiny town was the best decision of my life.

V0906_01_00_08_0.text:
Who's the prettiest puppy in the world?
You are!

V0906_01_00_09_0.text: Only a ramen master can defeat another ramen master.

V0906_01_00_10_0.text: I will never waver in my flavor!

V0906_03_00_00_0.text: You're an extra while I'm the star.

V0906_03_00_01_0.text: Your final scene is coming up!

V0906_03_00_03_0.text: I'll show you why I'm an A-lister!

V0906_03_00_04_0.text: If I can outlast the rain, the sun will shine again!

V0906_05_00_00_0.text: As long as I hang in there, my breakthrough role will come!

V0906_07_09_00_0.text: This is the card I Set!

V0906_07_09_01_0.text: Did you forget about this card?

V0906_08_00_00_0.text: I activate the Field Spell, Rainapolis!

V0906_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Embracing the Rain!

V0906_08_00_02_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Shape of Aqua!

V0906_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Kingdom of Bubbles!

V0906_08_00_04_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Cornful Charity!

V0906_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Freshberry Garden!

V0906_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Freshberry Swimming!

V0906_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Bye-Bye Strawberries!

V0906_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Strawberry Hunting!

V0906_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fusion!!!

V0906_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Shining City Nights!

V0906_08_00_11_1.text: I don't know why, but I feel like raising the roof!

V0906_09_00_00_0.text: Dian Keto the Cure Prodigy activates her effect!

V0906_09_00_01_0.text: Dian Keto the Cure Prodigy was my breakthrough role!

V0906_09_00_02_0.text: I activate Dian Keto the Cleaning Prodigy's effect!

V0906_09_00_03_0.text:
Dian Keto the Cleaning Prodigy!
Activate your effect!

V0906_09_00_03_1.text: I not only regain LP, Dian Keto the Cleaning Prodigy also gains ATK!

V0906_09_00_04_0.text: I activate Dian Keto the Food Prodigy's effect!

V0906_09_00_05_0.text: Dian Keto the Food Prodigy activates her effect!

V0906_09_00_05_1.text: I regain LP, and she gains ATK!

V0906_09_00_06_0.text: I activate Nuvia the Mischievous's effect!

V0906_09_00_08_0.text: Red-Boot Boost Dragon activates its effect!

V0906_09_00_09_0.text: I activate Catapult Baby Turtle's effect!

V0906_09_00_15_0.text: Freshberry Happiness Harvest activates her effect!

V0906_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0906_13_00_02_0.text:
Order's up!
Dian Keto the Food Prodigy!

V0906_16_00_00_0.text: I'll see you at the wrap party!

V0906_19_00_00_0.text:
Dian Keto the Cure Prodigy!
Attack!

V0906_19_00_00_1.text: There's no better cure than love straight from the heart!

V0906_19_00_01_0.text:
Dian Keto the Cleaning Prodigy!
Wipe 'em away!

V0906_19_00_01_1.text: No matter how messy the house, it can always be cleaned!

V0906_19_00_02_0.text:
Dian Keto the Food Prodigy!
Carve that culinary catastrophe!

V0906_19_00_03_0.text:
Tutumes Dark Witch!
Ballet all over 'em!

V0906_19_00_08_0.text:
Spirit of the Mini Harp!
Attack!

V0906_19_00_10_0.text:
Catapult Baby Turtle!
Snap your jaws!

V0906_21_00_00_0.text: You're not ready to play the lead.

V0906_21_00_01_0.text: You can't fight right 'til you get your mind right.

V0906_21_00_04_0.text: This isn't looking good for me at all!

V0906_26_00_00_0.text:
Humph...
Is that the best you got?

V0906_28_00_00_0.text: By mastering the basics, I can get through the jitters!

V0906_28_00_01_0.text: These are the skills I've learned in the big city!

V0906_28_00_02_0.text:
A Duel isn't just about cards.
It's also about heart.

V0906_28_00_03_0.text: If a little puppy won't give up, I won't either!

V0906_28_00_04_0.text:
Aaaand cut!
Phew! That took a lot outta me!

V0906_28_00_04_1.text:
What did you think of my acting?
Was I a convincing villain?

V0906_28_00_05_0.text: You need to be more subtle to disguise your tactics.

V0906_28_00_06_0.text: It was fun acting out scenes with you again, Yuamu!

V0906_28_00_07_0.text: Your Mean Mutt Style wasn't so mean.

V0906_28_00_08_0.text:
Bad doggy.
You always mess up at the worst time.

V0906_28_00_09_0.text: You need more complex flavors if you wanna outcook me!

V0906_28_00_10_0.text:
You thought you'd win?
Your bandanna must be too tight.

V0906_28_00_11_0.text: I need to find a new manager.

V0906_28_00_12_0.text:
London, dear?
I'm feeling a bit peckish.

V0906_29_00_00_0.text: I can't get too high on the highs or too low on the lows.

V0906_29_00_01_0.text:
My makeup's smeared!
My costume's torn!

V0906_29_00_02_0.text:
Ahhhh!
My time in the limelight is over!

V0906_29_00_03_0.text: How is anyone supposed to win against that!

V0906_29_00_05_0.text: I just have to dust myself off and try again!

V0906_29_00_06_0.text:
Nice, Yuamu!
You really got into your role!

V0906_29_00_07_0.text: I can't believe I lost to a twin from a tiny town!

V0906_29_00_07_1.text: The big city is where I deserve to be!

V0906_29_00_08_0.text: You wouldn't stop reviving monsters from your Graveyard.

V0906_29_00_09_0.text: Your attacks had a ton of seasoning.

V0906_29_00_10_0.text:
Londonnnn!
Do you want to be fired?

V0906_30_00_00_0.text: To remember the Monster Types, you should create a poem!

V0906_30_00_01_0.text: If you can answer my questions, you're a Rush Duel expert!

V0906_30_00_02_0.text: Q1: What are the three varieties of cards in a Rush Duel?

V0906_32_00_01_0.text:
Hi! It's me! Immi Imimi!
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links contains all the tips and tricks you need to become a Rush Duel expert!

V0906_33_00_01_0.text: This is talent in the works!

V0906_34_00_00_0.text: Q2: What are the four Phases in a Rush Duel?

V0906_34_00_01_0.text:
Q3:
What Summoning method requires you to Tribute a monster?

V0906_34_00_02_0.text: Q4: What Level can you Tribute Summon using two monsters?

V0906_34_00_05_0.text: You can revive monsters if you have the right effects!

V0906_34_00_06_0.text: If you want to improve, there's no better trainer than me!

V0906_34_00_07_0.text: In some Duels, there are battles you just can’t escape from.

V0906_34_00_10_0.text: No one asked you for your opinion!

V0906_34_00_11_0.text:
This isn't the real me.
I'm just acting!

V0906_34_00_12_0.text: Anything can happen on live TV!

V0906_34_00_13_0.text:
Nothing weird is going on.
It's all special effects!

V0906_34_00_14_0.text: Find out what happens next... after these messages!

V0906_34_00_15_0.text: What should I have for lunch... How about sushi?

V0906_34_00_16_0.text: London? Some tea to quench my thirst?

V0906_35_00_01_0.text:
I'm Immi Imimi!
The star of Duel Links!

V0906_36_00_00_0.text: If you win this Duel for us, I owe you one.

V0906_36_00_01_0.text: That's the end of my scene.

V0906_36_00_05_0.text: To get out of a mess, I trust no one more than Yuamu!

V0906_36_00_09_0.text: The sooner you end this Duel, the sooner we can have lunch.

V0906_36_00_10_0.text:
C'mon, get ready!
You're up next!

V0906_36_00_11_0.text: You're my manager, so manage our way outta this!

V0906_37_00_00_0.text: Whenever she appears on screen, the TV ratings shoot up 45%!

V0906_37_00_01_0.text:
Don't just think the clean!
You must be the clean!

V0906_37_00_02_0.text: Eating is the one thing that unites all aliens.

V0906_37_00_02_1.text: Cooking up this phenomenal feast is the queen of cuisine!

V0906_37_00_03_0.text: Power up the spotlight and blast across the stage!
